login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Access your Kubernetes dashboard
login.tryAgainHint: You can try logging in with a different account that has the required permissions.
login.configureAuth: Please configure authentication providers in your environment

errors.insufficientPermissions: Insufficient permissions to access this application.
errors.insufficientPermissionsUser: Access denied for user "{{user}}". Please contact your administrator to verify your permissions.
errors.insufficientPermissionsDetails: Your account does not have the required permissions to access this Kubernetes dashboard.
errors.tokenExchangeDetails: There was an issue exchanging the authorization code for an access token. Please try again.
errors.userInfoFailed: Unable to retrieve your profile information from {{provider}}.
errors.userInfoDetails: The authentication succeeded, but we could not access your profile. Please try again.
errors.jwtGenerationFailed: Unable to create your authentication session.
errors.jwtGenerationFailedUser: Failed to create a session for user "{{user}}".
errors.jwtGenerationDetails: Please try logging in again. If the problem persists, contact support.
errors.generalError: An unexpected error occurred during authentication.
errors.contactSupport: Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.
errors.userDisabledMessage: Your user account has been disabled. Please contact your administrator for more information.
errors.notInAllowedGroups: Authentication succeeded, but your account is not a member of the allowed groups in {{provider}}.
errors.notInAllowedGroupsDetails: Please contact your administrator to be added to an allowed group.

cluster.error403: You do not have permission to access this cluster. Please contact your administrator for more information.
cluster.noCluster: Please configure a cluster to start using Kite.

resourceTable.confirmDeletionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected {{resourceName}}? This action cannot be undone.
resourceTable.noneInNamespace: There are no resources in the {{namespace}} namespace

rbac.noPermissionCluster: User {{user}} does not have permission to {{verb}} {{resource}} on cluster {{cluster}}
rbac.noPermissionNamespace: User {{user}} does not have permission to {{verb}} {{resource}} in namespace {{namespace}} on cluster {{cluster}}
rbac.insufficientPermissions: You do not have sufficient permissions to perform this action

settings.title: Settings
settings.descriptionLocal: Manage local preferences, clusters and templates

aboutManagement.title: About
aboutManagement.description: View build info and update status.
aboutManagement.subtitle: A Wails v3-based desktop tool for multi-cluster K8S management.

update.idleDescription: Click "Check for updates" to compare this build with the latest GitHub release.
update.skippedDescription: The current build is a development version, so it cannot be compared with GitHub releases.
update.checkingDescription: Comparing the current build with the latest GitHub release.
update.ignoredDescription: This version was marked as ignored. You can enable it again at any time.
update.upToDateDescription: The current build already matches the latest GitHub release.
update.localNewerDescription: The local build version is higher than the latest published GitHub release.
update.noAssetDescription: The latest release is available, but there is no in-app update package for the current platform yet.

updateToast.downloadedDescription: The installer package has been downloaded. Restart the app to continue the update.

generalManagement.title: General
generalManagement.description: Manage global feature switches and related configuration.

form.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current API Key

form.openModeHint: Choose whether AI chat opens as an in-window overlay or a docked sidecar window.

kubectl.description: Enable kubectl terminal and configure runtime image.

nodeTerminal.title: Node Terminal
nodeTerminal.description: Configure runtime image used for node terminal sessions.

errors.apiKeyRequired: API Key is required when AI Agent is enabled
errors.kubectlImageRequired: Kubectl image is required when kubectl is enabled

ldap.title: LDAP
ldap.description: Enable LDAP username/password login and sync groups into RBAC.

form.useStartTLSHint: Enable StartTLS when using ldap:// endpoints.
form.bindPasswordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current bind password

errors.userBaseDnRequired: LDAP user base DN is required
errors.groupBaseDnRequired: LDAP group base DN is required
errors.userFilterPlaceholder: LDAP user filter must contain exactly one %s
errors.groupFilterPlaceholder: LDAP group filter must contain exactly one %s

oauth.description: Set up LDAP or OAuth authentication

clusterManagement.title: Cluster Management

empty.title: No clusters configured
empty.description: Add your first cluster to get started

messages.testRequired: Test the cluster connection before adding it.

clusterManagement.deleteConfirmation: This action will only remove the current cluster's configuration in kite and will not delete any cluster resources.

config.label: Kubeconfig
config.editNote: Leave empty to keep current configuration

prometheusURL.label: Prometheus URL
prometheusURL.help: Optional. Used to enable Prometheus-based monitoring features such as overview history charts and Pod metrics. If left empty, Kite will try to discover a Prometheus service in the cluster automatically.

isDefault.label: Set as Default
isDefault.help: Use this cluster as the default for new operations

inCluster.note: This cluster uses the in-cluster ServiceAccount configuration and does not require an additional kubeconfig.

oauthManagement.title: OAuth Provider Management
oauthManagement.deleteConfirmation: This action will remove the OAuth provider configuration. Users will no longer be able to login using this provider.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.clientSecretPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current secret

initialization.title: Initial Setup
initialization.welcome: Welcome! Let's set up your Kite dashboard
initialization.subtitle: Complete the following steps to get started
initialization.description: Configure your admin user and connect cluster

step1.title: Create Super Admin User
step1.description: If you want to use it anonymously, please set the `ANONYMOUS_USER_ENABLED` env variable to true

step2.title: Import Kubernetes Cluster
step2.kubeconfigPlaceholder: Paste your kubeconfig file content here...
step2.kubeconfigHint: You can find your kubeconfig file at ~/.kube/config or get it from your cluster provider
step2.fileHint: Select your kubeconfig file (usually located at ~/.kube/config)
step2.nativeFileHint: Choose the kubeconfig file to import
step2.nativeFileError: Failed to open native file picker

completion.title: Setup Complete!
completion.message: You will be redirected to the dashboard shortly...

drainNode.title: Drain Node
drainNode.description: Safely evict all pods from this node.

taintNode.title: Taint Node
taintNode.description: Add a taint to prevent pods from being scheduled.

scaleDeployment.title: Scale Deployment
scaleDeployment.description: Adjust the number of replicas for this deployment.

restartDeployment.title: Restart Deployment
restartDeployment.description: This will restart all pods in the deployment by updating the deployment's template with a new restart annotation. This action cannot be undone.

restartDaemonSet.title: Restart DaemonSet
restartDaemonSet.description: This will restart all pods managed by this DaemonSet. This action cannot be undone.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
